title: Government Shutdown Maybe But Wed Still Look At Tech
section_path: Government Shutdown Maybe But Wed Still Look At Tech
section_path_text: Government Shutdown Maybe But Wed Still Look At Tech
summary:
Main
The three things investors need to know this week:
The AI boom continues strong, with a significant pick up in investment deals during the past three weeks. US inflation keeps creeping up, but not nearly at an alarming pace - yet. The US government is likely to shut down this week.
